title: Basic JavaScript Whiteboard App
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Whiteboard App. Focus on implementing Canvas drawing tools correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Whiteboard App
description: Create a function that uses Canvas drawing tools and Shape tools (rectangle, circle, line) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Whiteboard App Project
description: Build a small application that applies Canvas drawing tools, Shape tools (rectangle, circle, line), Color picker and brush size in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Whiteboard App
description: The following code has bugs related to Canvas drawing tools. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Whiteboard App
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Canvas drawing tools and Shape tools (rectangle, circle, line).
